entries.speaker: sable
lines: Is that... normal?

entries.speaker: lira
lines: No. That's a reaction. Something about what we're
carrying is making them—

entries.speaker: torren
lines: Stop there.

entries.speaker: torren
lines: You're carrying something that doesn't belong in
these woods.

entries.speaker: edren
lines: We're passing through. We mean no—

entries.speaker: torren
lines: I know what you mean. I also know what you're
carrying. The totems told me before you crossed the ridge.

entries.speaker: sable
lines: The... totems told you.

entries.speaker: torren
lines: They shake when that thing gets close. They've been
shaking since dawn.

entries.speaker: torren
lines: My name is Torren. I speak for the spirits of these
woods — what's left of them. Where are you taking it?

entries.speaker: edren
lines: Valdris. We're reporting to the crown.

entries.speaker: torren
lines: The crown doesn't know what this is. Neither do you.

entries.speaker: lira
lines: And you do?

entries.speaker: torren
lines: No. But I know someone who might. A woman lives
deep in the forest. Maren. She was a court mage before she was
an exile. If anyone understands what you've found, it's her.

entries.speaker: cael
lines: Why would an exile help us?

entries.speaker: torren
lines: Because she chose exile to study things like this.
Come. I'll take you to her. But we stop at Roothollow first —
my people deserve to know what's passing through their land.

entries.speaker: vessa
lines: Torren. I felt you coming. I felt what they carry.

entries.speaker: vessa
lines: That thing you carry — the totems know it. They're
shaking. Take it from my home before dawn, or I will put it in
the river myself.

entries.speaker: edren
lines: We don't intend to stay. Torren says there's someone
who can—

entries.speaker: vessa
lines: Maren. Yes. She'll understand what you've found. I
understand enough to know it shouldn't be here.

entries.speaker: vessa
lines: Go with them. Make sure that thing reaches someone
who can contain it — not use it. Not study it. Contain it.

entries.speaker: torren
lines: I will.

entries.speaker: vessa
lines: And Torren — when you come back, bring me something
that isn't dread. I'm tired of dread.
